chunks.text: MAK/PS ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI Const. Petition No. D-2469 of 2025 __________________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature(s) of Judge(s) Fresh Case. 1. For orders on office objection Nos.1,3 & 5. 2. For orders on Misc. No.11647/25 3. For orders on Misc. No.11648/25 4. For hearing of main case. 02.06.2025. Mr. Khalid Mehmood Dhoon, Advocate for the Petitioner. ------------------------------ Main grievance of the petitioner is that the construction work is being carried out on public park/playground situated on plot No.ST-4, Block 13-A, Gulshan-e-Iqbal, KDA Scheme No.24 Karachi in violation of relevant building regulations. The petitioner had written a letter/complaint dated 23.05.2025 to the Chairman, TMC, Gulshan-e-Iqbal Karachi regarding aforesaid illegal construction but he has not received any response thereto. The Mayor Karachi is directed to look into such alleged illegal construction and take appropriate action under the law if the construction is in fact illegal. A copy of this order shall be sent to Mayor Karachi for compliance. The instant petition stands disposed of in the above terms alongwith all listed applications. HEAD OF CONST. BENCHES JUDGE
